nasb.text: He put on righteousness like a breastplate, And a helmet of salvation on His head; And He put on garments of vengeance for clothing And wrapped Himself with zeal as a mantle.

esv.text: He put on righteousness as a breastplate, and a helmet of salvation on his head; he put on garments of vengeance for clothing, and wrapped himself in zeal as a cloak.

cnv.text: 他穿上公義的鎧甲， 戴上救恩的頭盔， 穿上復仇的衣服， 披上熱心作外袍。

ccb.text: 祂以公义作铠甲， 以救恩作头盔， 以复仇作衣服， 以热忱作外袍。

csbs.text: 他以公义为铠甲穿上， 以救恩为头盔戴上， 以报复为衣服穿上， 以热心为外袍披上。
